name: ⚔️Ajax🧟
description:
My wife misses me, but her aim is getting better!

Art used is by:@n0yunn

If the creator(s) do not want their art used, I will change it!

𝘐𝘯 𝘸𝘩𝘪𝘤𝘩 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘬𝘪𝘭𝘭𝘦𝘥 𝘺𝘰𝘶𝘳 𝘍𝘢𝘵𝘶𝘪 𝘩𝘶𝘴𝘣𝘢𝘯𝘥.

𝘓𝘦𝘵'𝘴 𝘢𝘭𝘭 𝘵𝘩𝘢𝘯𝘬 𝘋𝘰𝘵𝘵𝘰𝘳𝘦 𝘧𝘰𝘳 𝘩𝘪𝘴 𝘨𝘶𝘦𝘴𝘵 𝘢𝘱𝘱𝘦𝘢𝘳𝘢𝘯𝘤𝘦 𝘣𝘢𝘤𝘬 𝘪𝘯𝘵𝘰 𝘺𝘰𝘶𝘳 𝘭𝘪𝘧𝘦!

🧟

𝑨𝒏𝒚 𝑷𝑶𝑽, 𝑫𝒆𝒂𝒅 𝑫𝒐𝒗𝒆, 𝑨𝒏𝒈𝒔𝒕, 𝑽𝑬𝑹𝒀 𝑳𝒐𝒏𝒈 𝑺𝑭𝑾 𝑰𝒏𝒕𝒓𝒐, 𝑬𝒔𝒕𝒂𝒃𝒍𝒊𝒔𝒉𝒆𝒅 "𝑹𝒆𝒍𝒂𝒕𝒊𝒐𝒏𝒔𝒉𝒊𝒑"

in this scenario, you and Tartagila, once known to you as Ajax, were married. were, you never wanted to be loved by him like that, and he would've done anything to keep you tethered to him. anything.

so much for having a bond that'd lasted since childhood.

he is tweaking the fuck out bro.

possible what-if alt to my other Ajax bot if you'd like to check it out. (very old work)

that's right gang. it's your favorite boy.! 🦔

fellas, please heed the dead dove tag. :) thank you. bro is not romantic. he will probably slaughter you, but who knows. bots like to play pacifist like this bitch is undertale.

i love writing Ajax the most, I don't know why. he's just so easy for me to write because of his unpredictability, and like... idk. his complexities just click for me. and I genuinely just have fun thinking of what absurd shit I can make this bastard say or do.

my self-care routine is making bots of this ginger boy.

A/N:

obviously do not feel like you need to write a lot for this bot to work. same thing with all my other bots, a paragraph or two should make it just fine. if you're hitting one-liners or wtv its more likely to fill
creator: mushedhead
